name: Addis in Cape Ethiopian Restaurant
description: Authentic Ethiopian cuisine with traditional injera bread. Great atmosphere and friendly service.

name: Seven Colours Eatery
description: Local South African comfort food with colorful, vibrant flavors. Perfect for casual dining.

name: The Idiot Sandwich Café
description: Creative sandwiches and coffee in a charming, quirky café setting. Great for lunch and coffee breaks.

name: Andalousse Moroccan Restaurant
description: Authentic Moroccan tagines and couscous. Beautiful ambiance with traditional décor.

name: Addis Red Sea Ethiopian Restaurant
description: Traditional Ethiopian dining experience with family-style serving. Excellent spice blends.
